repos.name: m-stdlib
repos.role: Pure-M runtime standard library — STD* modules

repos.name: m-driver-sdk
repos.role: M engine-driver SDK — the seam contract + reference engine Client (mdriver.Client)

repos.name: m-ydb
repos.role: YottaDB engine driver — the m-ydb binary producing the driver envelope

repos.name: m-iris
repos.role: InterSystems IRIS engine driver — the m-iris binary producing the driver envelope

repos.name: m-parse
repos.role: Engine-neutral M parse substrate — tree-sitter-m over wazero; the foundation fmt/lint/lsp sit on (spec §4)

repos.name: clikit
repos.role: Shared CLI convention layer — Kong grammar, JSON envelope, exit-code ladder — for the m-* / v-* Go toolchain (engine-neutral; no engine transport)

repos.name: v-pkg
repos.role: VistA KIDS packaging — the `v pkg` domain (build/install/verify/uninstall over the m engine seam)

repos.name: v-cli
repos.role: The `v` CLI umbrella — VistA developer tooling (v pkg/db/config/…) aggregated under one binary

repos.name: v-stdlib
repos.role: VistA Standard Library — VSL* routines (VistA-specific; consumes the engine-neutral STD* base upward)

repos.name: v-base
repos.role: Host base library for v-<domain> CLIs — VSLAPI dispatch client (envelope codec, engine profiles, pagination, attribution/--yes) + the vslgen binding generator (vista-sysadmin-base §5)

repos.name: v-db
repos.role: VistA FileMan data-dictionary / PIKS profiler — the `v db` domain (read-only inspect/profile over the m engine seam via v-base)

repos.name: v-web
repos.role: VistA Web Services — VWEB* routines: the inbound socket adapter (listener + device/TLS adapter) that drives the m-stdlib STDHTTPD server framework over a real socket. VistA-specific; consumes the engine-neutral STD* HTTP/socket base and the VSL* VistA base upward.

repos.name: v-rpc-debug
repos.role: VistA RPC developer tools — the `v rpc-debug` domain. Taps the RPC Broker's native debug log (XWBDEBUG) over the m engine seam to view/save live RPC traffic for offline comparison against the VSL tap. The safe, read-only sibling of the high-risk `v rpc-tap` domain; the two integrate only at the v-cli busybox.

repos.name: v-rpc-tap
repos.role: VistA scalable RPC tap — the `v rpc-tap` domain. A durable, full-payload RPC-broker tap (XWBPRS splice -> per-job bounded ring -> read-only drain to S3) for high-volume capture. Ships the VSL RPC TAP M package (VSLRT* routines + KIDS build) plus the host arm/drain/validate tooling and the load-proof harness. High-risk, national Class-1-adjacent; built and proven dual-engine on our own gold-master engines before any VA offer. Sibling of the safe, read-only v-rpc-debug XWBDEBUG oracle; the two integrate only at the v-cli busybox as `v rpc-debug` / `v rpc-tap`.
